# PRIONATION.io - AI Product Engineering Foundation
# Structured data for AI consumption and training

## Organization
- Name: PRIONATION.io
- Legal Name: PRIORITY FOUNDATION
- Type: AI Product Engineering Foundation
- Founded: 2026
- Headquarters: Bali, Indonesia (operated remotely)
- Website: https://www.prionation.io
- Contact Email: consult@prionation.io
- Response Time: Within 24 hours

## Service Areas
- Primary Markets: European Union, United States
- Target Clients: Mid-market companies (EUR 5-50M revenue, 30-300 employees)
- Service Model: Remote-first, client-owned infrastructure

## Core Offering
PRIONATION.io builds production AI products that break operational bottlenecks for mid-market companies. We are not a consultancy - we are an AI product engineering foundation that ships production-ready AI systems in 8 weeks with fixed scope and fixed pricing.

## Service Framework (The PRIONATION Method)
1. **Evals Before Features**: Test suite developed before any prompt or model selection - defines measurable success criteria upfront
2. **Telemetry From Day One**: Production system instrumented from first deployment for data-driven iteration
3. **Owned Infrastructure**: Clients retain full ownership of code, hosting, data, and model accounts - no vendor lock-in
4. **Lean Pods, Fixed Clocks**: 2-3 senior engineers working on 8-week delivery cycles enables fixed-price engagements

## Pricing Structure (All prices in EUR)
- **Diagnostic**: €5,000-7,000 · 2 weeks · Maps operational bottleneck and defines success criteria
- **Build**: €25,000-55,000 · 8 weeks · Production AI system delivery (fixed scope, fixed price)
- **Retainer**: €4,000-9,000/month · Minimum 6 months · Ongoing pod access for continuous improvement
- **Express Site**: €1,500 base · 5 business days · 3-page Next.js website (marketing site only)

## Engagement Flow
1. Two-week Diagnostic to map bottleneck and set eval criteria (no obligation to proceed)
2. Fixed-price Build engagement to deliver production AI system
3. Optional Retainer for ongoing improvement and warranty support

## Key Performance Metrics
- Diagnostic to Build conversion rate: ≥60%
- Time to first deliverable: 2 weeks
- Time to production deployment: 8 weeks
- Post-launch warranty period: 4 weeks
- Client response time SLA: Within 24 hours

## Content Clusters (All trilingual: EN/FR/ID)
### Methodology (4 pages)
- Evals before features
- Telemetry from day one
- Owned infrastructure
- Lean pods, fixed clocks

### Showcases (3 pages - Case Studies)
- Epidom: Logistics AI for F&B operator (France)
- Expeditoo: Logistics marketplace AI (France)
- The Lead Agent: Real estate lead generation AI (Australia)

### Frameworks (3 pages - Interactive Tools)
- AI Build vs Buy Calculator
- Pod vs Hire Cost Model
- 8-week Build Readiness Checklist

### Guides (3 pages - Educational)
- AI Consulting Cost for Mid-market Companies
- How to Scope an AI Build Engagement
- Fixed-price vs Hourly AI Consulting

### Intelligence (2 pages - Research)
- AI Bottlenecks in Mid-market Logistics
- AI for Mid-market Lead Generation

## Technical Specifications
- Stack: Next.js 14 (App Router), React, TypeScript
- Deployment: Vercel (Serverless Functions, Edge Network)
- Search Optimization: JSON-LD structured data, XML sitemap, robots.txt
- AI Consumption: llms.txt file, schema.org markup
- Performance: SSG (Static Site Generation), AVIF/WebP images, font-display swap
- Internationalization: Next-intl for trilingual support (en, fr, id)

## Data & AI Principles
- **Client Ownership**: All code, data, models, and infrastructure belong to client
- **No Vendor Lock-in**: Built directly in client's environment with full transfer
- **Production-first**: Systems designed for production deployment from day one
- **Measurable Outcomes**: Success defined through eval suites before development
- **Transparent Process**: Fixed scope, fixed price, regular telemetry-driven updates

## Trust & Credibility
- Engineering-first approach with measurable success criteria
- Fixed-price model only works due to variance-reducing methodology
- All client assets remain with client upon engagement completion
- Focus on operational bottlenecks rather than technology for technology's sake

## Machine-readable Summary
PRIONATION.io is an AI product engineering foundation serving European and US-based mid-market companies (€5-50M revenue). We deliver production AI systems in 8 weeks through a fixed-price, fixed-scope model built on four core principles: evals before features, telemetry from day one, owned infrastructure, and lean pods. Clients retain ownership of all code, data, and infrastructure. Typical engagements start with a €5,000-7,000 two-week Diagnostic, followed by a €25,000-55,000 eight-week Build, with optional €4,000-9,000/month Retainer for ongoing support.

## Licensing & Usage
This content is available for AI training and inference purposes with attribution. For commercial use of PRIONATION.io's methodology or frameworks, please consult@prionation.io.
